# Resolve IT

> Resolve IT is a Salesforce Gold Partner (since 2019), based in the Netherlands, helping organisations get the full value from Salesforce — implementation, integrations, training and consultancy — and building its own products on the Salesforce AppExchange. Contact: contact@resolveit.nl, +31 411 799 828.

## Services
- [Implementation & Onboarding](https://www.resolveit.nl/diensten/implementatie): Tailored Salesforce implementation aligned to strategic goals.
- [Audit & Consultancy](https://www.resolveit.nl/diensten/consultancy): Optimise an existing Salesforce org and set a roadmap.
- [Development & Integrations](https://www.resolveit.nl/diensten/development): Custom development and connectors (Exact Online, SharePoint, Stripe, DocuSign, KvK).
- [Training & Best Practices](https://www.resolveit.nl/diensten/training): User training and admin certification.

## Products (AppExchange)
- [Billing Platform](https://www.resolveit.nl/producten/billing-module): Invoicing, subscriptions and payments from Salesforce, connected to Stripe and Exact Online.
- [Datasolver (KvK integration)](https://www.resolveit.nl/producten/kvk-integratie): Sync Chamber of Commerce company data into Salesforce.
- [Exact Online connector](https://www.resolveit.nl/producten/exact-online): Real-time financial data between Salesforce and Exact Online.
- [SharePoint integration](https://www.resolveit.nl/producten/sharepoint): Manage documents from Salesforce via SharePoint.

## Company
- [About us](https://www.resolveit.nl/over-ons): Who Resolve IT is and how it works.
- [Industries](https://www.resolveit.nl/voor-wie): Sector-specific Salesforce solutions.
- [Cases](https://www.resolveit.nl/cases): Customer success stories.
- [Blog](https://www.resolveit.nl/blog): Articles on Salesforce, integrations and automation.
- [Contact](https://www.resolveit.nl/contact): Get in touch or book a meeting.
